query:
-- Desativar opções duplicadas nos grupos Turbine dos Kits e Mixes
UPDATE menu_addon_options co
JOIN menu_addon_groups cg ON cg.id = co.groupId
SET co.isActive = 0
WHERE cg.name LIKE '%Turbine%' 
  AND cg.menuItemId IN (150020, 150021, 150022, 150023)
  AND co.id >= 30000;

-- Verificar resultado
SELECT cg.id, cg.name, mi.name as item, COUNT(co.id) as active_opts
FROM menu_addon_groups cg
JOIN menu_items mi ON mi.id = cg.menuItemId
JOIN menu_addon_options co ON co.groupId = cg.id AND co.isActive = 1
WHERE cg.name LIKE '%Turbine%' AND cg.menuItemId IN (150020, 150021, 150022, 150023)
GROUP BY cg.id, cg.name, mi.name;

-- Desativar opções duplicadas nos grupos Turbine dos Kits e Mixes
UPDATE menu_addon_options co
JOIN menu_addon_groups cg ON cg.id = co.groupId
SET co.isActive = 0
WHERE cg.name LIKE '%Turbine%' 
  AND cg.menuItemId IN (150020, 150021, 150022, 150023)
  AND co.id >= 30000;

-- Verificar resultado
SELECT cg.id, cg.name, mi.name as item, COUNT(co.id) as active_opts
FROM menu_addon_groups cg
JOIN menu_items mi ON mi.id = cg.menuItemId
JOIN menu_addon_options co ON co.groupId = cg.id AND co.isActive = 1
WHERE cg.name LIKE '%Turbine%' AND cg.menuItemId IN (150020, 150021, 150022, 150023)
GROUP BY cg.id, cg.name, mi.name;
